title: PredicateType
description: Types of zero-knowledge predicates supported in Presentation Policies

RANGE_PROOF.description: Proves a numeric claim satisfies a range condition without revealing the value

MEMBERSHIP.description: Proves a claim value is in an allowed set without revealing which value
MEMBERSHIP.example: country_code is one of US, CA, MX

EQUALITY.description: Proves a claim equals a specific value (useful for boolean flags)

NON_MEMBERSHIP.description: Proves a claim value is NOT in a set

INEQUALITY.description: Proves a claim is not equal to a specific value
